Worm Zone Arena

Control a worm in a circular arena, consuming food pellets to grow longer and heavier. Avoid colliding with arena walls and other worms' bodies. Use boost to outmaneuver opponents and force them into your body. Collect power-ups for temporary advantages. Survive and grow to achieve the highest mass on the leaderboard!

Arrow Keys (←↑→↓): Steer the worm's direction | Space: Activate speed boost (consumes 10 mass per second) | Enter: Start the game from the start screen | ESC: Pause/Unpause during gameplay | R: Return to start screen from game over
